description.zh: 基于 Unity3D 的汽车可视化工具，支持多种配置与高性能优化。
description.en: Unity3D-based car visualizer with multiple configurations and high-performance optimization.

description.zh: 高精度建模、烘焙光照与沉浸式 VR 交互体验。
description.en: High-fidelity modeling, baked lighting, and immersive VR interaction.

description.zh: 具有交互式问答与数据追踪的教育仿真系统。
description.en: Educational simulation system with interactive quizzes and data tracking.

description.zh: 集成语音识别与 AI 接口，实现自然语言对话。
description.en: Integrated voice recognition and AI API for natural language conversation.

description.zh: 在屏幕上书写签名并叠加到卡片，上传服务器供扫码下载。
description.en: Write the signature on the screen and overlay it on the card, upload it to the server for scanning and downloading.

description.zh: 点击屏幕放置沙具，可加载保存沙盘场景并导出心理报告。
description.en: Click on the screen to place sand tools, which can load and save sandbox scenes, and export psychological reports.
